title: Segmentation fault with `hasAllTokens` and `sparseGrams` without direct read optimizatimization
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
Running a text index query, with `sparseGrams` tokenization, with `query_plan_direct_read_from_text_index=0`, crashes.
Fiddle: https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/67de3ab8-265c-4799-81fa-9a65d51b3994
```
SET allow_experimental_full_text_index;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS logs;
CREATE TABLE logs
(
message String,
INDEX ix_text_message message TYPE text(tokenizer='sparseGrams')
)
ENGINE = MergeTree
ORDER BY message
AS SELECT *
FROM url('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dwyl/english-words/refs/heads/master/words_alpha.txt');
SELECT *
FROM logs
WHERE hasAllTokens(message, sparseGrams('zymosimeter'))
SETTINGS use_skip_indexes_on_data_read=1, query_plan_direct_read_from_text_index=0;
```
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
No
### How to reproduce
Version: head = 25.11.1.1444 (in fiddle), also 25.11.1.1156 (official build, downloaded from CI)
The crash also reproduces with `use_skip_indexes_on_data_read=0`, so it seems independent of streaming skip indexes.
It does *not* reproduce with `query_plan_direct_read_from_text_index=1`.
It does *not* reproduce with `splitByNonAlpha` or `ngrams(3)` tokenizers, either.
### Expected behavior
I expect to retrieve a single matching row, `zymosimeter`, and this happens when direct read is enabled.
### Error message and/or stacktrace
From the top of Fiddle:
```
[81cf17506463] 2025.11.05 21:34:31.859232 [ 81 ] <Fatal> BaseDaemon: ########################################
[81cf17506463] 2025.11.05 21:34:31.859324 [ 81 ] <Fatal> BaseDaemon: (version 25.11.1.1444 (official build), build id: F66EE4D00E541E166C8090E2C0509EF87B518B31, git hash: 0c274f208fcbd413277aba90ecacaf440096a491) (from thread 773) (query_id: 5cbcbafd-c441-4c02-8b07-e21514b9dde6) (query: SELECT *
FROM logs
WHERE hasAllTokens(message, sparseGrams('zymosimeter'))
SETTINGS use_skip_indexes_on_data_read=1, query_plan_direct_read_from_text_index=0;) Received signal Segmentation fault (11)
[81cf17506463] 2025.11.05 21:34:31.859396 [ 81 ] <Fatal> BaseDaemon: Address: 0x729b5ebf4000. Access: read. Attempted access has violated the permissions assigned to the memory area.

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_logs (id INT, message VARCHAR, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_logs (id, message) VALUES (1, 'zymosimeter'), (2, 'example'), (3, NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_logs WHERE message LIKE '%zymosimeter%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_logs WHERE created_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 DAY';
key_bug_features: hasAllTokens with sparseGrams and direct read disabled
